2. trousers: "Trousers are clothing." / "Hosen sind Kleidung." / "ズボンは衣類だ。" / "裤子是服装。" (Japanese: ズボン is trousers; 衣類 is clothing. Chinese: 裤子 trousers; 服装 clothing.)

3. trout: "A trout is a fish." / "Eine Forelle ist ein Fisch." / "マスは魚だ。" / "鳟鱼是鱼。" (Note: trout is マス in Japanese, 鳟鱼 in Chinese. But 鳟鱼 might be specific; common term is 鳟鱼 or 虹鳟? But 鱼 is fine. Use "鳟鱼是鱼。" Or "一条鳟鱼是鱼。" Better: "鳟鱼是鱼。" Good.)

4. trowel: "A trowel is a tool." / "Eine Kelle ist ein Werkzeug." / "こては道具だ。" / "泥刀是工具。" (German: Kelle is trowel, Japanese: こて (kote) is trowel, Chinese: 泥刀 (nídāo) or 瓦刀? Use 泥刀 is common. Or "抹子" is also. I'll use 抹子? But 泥刀 is fine. To be safe: "泥刀是工具。")

5. truck: "A truck is a vehicle." / "Ein Lastwagen ist ein Fahrzeug." / "トラックは車両だ。" / "卡车是车辆。" (German: Lastwagen, Japanese: トラック, Chinese: 卡车.)

6. true: "A true statement is a fact." / "Eine wahre Aussage ist eine Tatsache." / "真実の文は事実だ。" / "真实的陈述是事实。" (Japanese: 真実の文 - could be 真実の文章 but 文 is fine. Chinese: 真实的陈述.)

7. truer: "A truer story is a narrative." / "Eine wahrere Geschichte ist eine Erzählung." / "より真実の物語はナラティブだ。" / "更真实的故事是叙述。" (Note: Japanese ナラティブ is narrative loanword, common. Or 物語? But Y should be broader category: 物語 is story itself. But ナラティブ is narrative. Could use "より真実の物語は物語だ" but that's circular. Better: "より真実の物語は物語の一種だ。" But too long. Use "ナラティブ" as narrative concept. Accept.)

8. trumpet: "A trumpet is a musical instrument." / "Eine Trompete ist ein Musikinstrument." / "トランペットは楽器だ。" / "小号是乐器。" (Chinese: 小号 or 喇叭? 小号 is common. Or 喇叭 is general. Use 小号是乐器。)

9. truncating: "Truncating is shortening." / "Abschneiden ist Kürzen." / "切り詰めることは短縮だ。" / "截断是缩短。" (German: abschneiden is to cut off; kürzen is to shorten. Japanese: 切り詰める (kiritsumeru) means to cut short. Chinese: 截断 (jiéduàn) means truncate. 缩短 (suōduǎn) shorten.)

10. trunk: "A trunk is a part of a tree." / "Ein Stamm ist ein Teil eines Baumes." / "幹は木の一部だ。" / "树干是树的一部分。" (Japanese: 幹 (miki) is trunk. Chinese: 树干 (shùgàn) is trunk. Good.)

All good. Now output JSON.
